items.title: Beyond Lovable and Mistral: 21 European startups to watch
items.summary: It is not that European startups never get attention — Lovable and Mistral AI are proof of that. But there are many more that insiders are tracking.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Meta acquires robotics AI startup as it makes the push into humanoid machines
items.summary: The company has purchased Assured Robot Intelligence, whose staff is joining Meta's Superintelligence Labs.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Tovala Family Meals Review: Good Food, Lots of Salt
items.summary: Tovala is a meal kit that comes with a smart oven, or a smart oven that comes with a meal kit. New family meals make it much more useful. But lord, the sodium.
